comments: [A13] Thames Gateway (Eastbound) at the junction of Ferry Lane - Road is closed following a collision.
currentUpdate: Use an alternative route. Eastbound traffic is slow moving on the approach with queues reaching Goresbrook Interchange.  Westbound traffic is slow on approach, with Ferry Lane also congested due to diverting vehicles. Delays have also been reported on Marsh Way,, New Road and Ripple Road. Expect delays

comments: Gallows Corner Flyover Refurbishment - [A12] Eastern Avenue East (All directions) at the junction of [A12] Colchester Road - Various restrictions, to facilitate the refurbishment of Gallows Corner Flyover. Full closure westbound only of the Flyover and westbound A12 and A127. Lane restrictions in place eastbound on A12 and on all approaches to Gallows Corner roundabout to facilitate reconstructing and resurfacing.
currentUpdate: Use alternative routes. Eastbound routes have reopened, and part of the Gallows Corner roundabout is now accessible. Average additional travel time is 3–5 minutes for buses and road users on Ardleigh Green Road, Gubbins Lane, and Gooshays Drive. A further 1–3 minutes of extra travel time is expected on North Street heading away from Romford. Minor delays continue towards the A127 restrictions. Additional congestion is also likely on the westbound A13 and the M11 southbound during peak periods as drivers seek alternative routes.

comments: Pride in London 2026 - [A4202] Park Lane (Southbound) at the junction of Upper Grosvenor Street - Pride in London 2026 is taking place within the Central London area with extensive road closures in place to facilitate the event. A parade will take place from Park Lane to Whitehall via Piccadilly, Piccadilly Circus, Haymarket and Trafalgar Square. Staged events will also take place at Trafalgar Square, Golden Square, Leicester Square, Dean Street, Soho Square and Victoria Embankment Gardens.
currentUpdate: There are extensive road closures in Central London with slow moving traffic on diversion routes.  Use alternative routes.
